snippets.snippet: Biosphere people today are tied in with the global technological and economic system. This frees them from the restraints of any one particular ecosystem, since they can draw upon energy and resources from an economic network which extends throughout the entire biosphere. We need only examine the sources of the food consumed in any modern city to see that they come from virtually all of the continents and oceans of the world.

and “world market” not “marketplace’’) - that is, impersonal © and businesslike interactions as opposed to the close human ties implied by the words “‘community,” “‘village’’ and “marketplace”; but also a growing, if still fragile, sense of “world public opinion” and of shared responsibility for all human beings.
